name: Salesforce
description: Sync contacts, accounts, opportunities, leads, and cases from Salesforce CRM.

install_fields.label: Consumer Key (Client ID)
install_fields.help: From Salesforce Setup → App Manager → Connected App → Consumer Key

install_fields.label: Consumer Secret (Client Secret)
install_fields.help: Consumer Secret from your Salesforce Connected App

install_fields.label: Callback URL
install_fields.help: OAuth redirect/callback URL registered in your Salesforce Connected App

install_fields.label: Use Sandbox
install_fields.help: Enable to use test.salesforce.com instead of login.salesforce.com

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the OAuth access token by pinging the Salesforce REST API root.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping the Salesforce REST API root and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync CRM Records
methods.description: Full or incremental sync of Leads, Contacts, and Opportunities into the knowledge base.

methods.name: SOQL Query
methods.description: Execute an arbitrary SOQL query against the org.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: List Contacts ordered by LastModifiedDate descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Accounts
methods.description: List Accounts ordered by LastModifiedDate descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Opportunities
methods.description: List Opportunities ordered by LastModifiedDate descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Leads
methods.description: List Leads ordered by LastModifiedDate descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Cases
methods.description: List Cases ordered by LastModifiedDate descending via SOQL.
